title: pastinaca armena subsp. armena
intro: Pastinaca armena subsp. armena, also known as Armenian parsley or garden turnip, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pastinaca armena subsp. armena include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
